defaults.ticker: GPT-5.6  ·  GATED PREVIEW  ·  GOVERNMENT-APPROVED PARTNERS ONLY  ·  BROADER RELEASE IN WEEKS

rundown.headline: OpenAI Limits GPT-5.6 Rollout
bullets: New flagship models held back from general release

beats.text: Good evening. OpenAI is pulling back the rollout of its newest models.
The company is limiting access to its GPT-5.6 lineup to a small group of government-approved partners.

rundown.headline: A Government Request
rundown.ticker: WASHINGTON  ·  CONTROLLED DEPLOYMENT REQUESTED  ·  SAFETY CONCERNS CITED
bullets: Trump administration asked for controlled deployment
All three models restricted, citing safety concerns

beats.text: The move follows a request from the Trump administration for controlled deployment of advanced A-I systems.
The administration restricted all three models, citing safety concerns, just weeks after Anthropic withdrew its Fable 5 model.
The lineup has three models: Sol, the flagship; Terra, for everyday use; and Luna, a faster, lower-cost option.
OpenAI says Sol edges out Anthropic’s Claude Mythos 5 at coding, while using a third fewer output tokens.

rundown.headline: OpenAI Pushes Back
rundown.ticker: OPENAI STATEMENT  ·  “SHORT-TERM STEP”  ·  NEW CYBERSECURITY FRAMEWORKS PLANNED
bullets: Complying, but calls the arrangement a “short-term step”
Working with the administration on new frameworks

beats.text: OpenAI is complying, but it made its displeasure clear, calling the arrangement a short-term step.
Quote: We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default.

rundown.headline: What's Next
rundown.ticker: ROLLOUT  ·  PARTNERS NOW  ·  CHATGPT, CODEX & API IN COMING WEEKS
bullets: Preview limited to select partners for now
ChatGPT, Codex, and API access in coming weeks

beats.text: For now, the preview is limited to those select partners.
OpenAI says broader access for ChatGPT, Codex, and its A-P-I is planned in the coming weeks. We'll keep following this story. Thanks for watching.
